ns0:entry.ns0:title: [qml] Cuperino/QPrompt-Teleprompter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cuperino/QPrompt-Teleprompter
Language: qml
Teleprompter software for all video creators. Built with ease of use, productivity, control accuracy, and smooth performance in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
Language: python
FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [c++] ValveSoftware/GameNetworkingSockets
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ValveSoftware/GameNetworkingSockets
Language: c++
Reliable & unreliable messages over UDP. Robust message fragmentation & reassembly. P2P networking / NAT traversal. Encryption.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: verilog

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/serpro69/claude-toolbox
Language: shell

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [lean] lfglabs-dev/verity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lfglabs-dev/verity
Language: lean
Formally verified smart contracts gives mathematical certainty across all inputs and execution paths. We bet that agents will make full formal verification practical.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] cerbos/cerbos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cerbos/cerbos
Language: go
Cerbos is the open core, language-agnostic, scalable authorization solution that makes user permissions and authorization simple to implement and manage by writing context-aware access control policies for your application resources.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
